items.title: La ‘vía Aldama’ se abre paso en el ‘caso Zapatero’: los empresarios desmontan la defensa del expresidente
items.description: Los empresarios Julio Martínez Martínez, administrador de Análisis Relevante, y Julio Martínez Sola y Roberto Roselli, presidente y actual consejero delegado de la compañía aérea Plus Ultra, empezaron a recorrer este lunes la vía Aldama , el camino que llevó al principal comisionista del caso Koldo a beneficiarse de una abultada rebaja de pena tras autoinculparse y detallar sus tejemanejes con el exministro José Luis Ábalos y el asesor Koldo García para beneficiarse del amaño de contratos públicos. Martínez Martínez, Martínez Sola y Roselli han entregado en la Audiencia Nacional sendos escritos en los que se prestan a colaborar en la investigación abierta por posibles irregularidades en el rescate de 53 millones de euros que el Gobierno concedió a la aerolínea en la pandemia de covid-19 y señalan directamente al expresidente del Gobierno José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero, imputado en este caso. Seguir leyendo

items.title: El horizonte judicial de Zapatero pende de la declaración ante el juez de Julio Martínez tras su decisión de “colaborar”
items.description: El futuro penal de José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero tiene nombre propio. El empresario Julio Martínez Martínez, administrador de la consultora que pagó durante cinco años al expresidente del Gobierno, declara este martes ante el juez de la Audiencia Nacional José Luis Calama, después de contradecir por escrito la versión que dio Zapatero ante el instructor, en la que se desvinculó del rescate público de la aerolínea Plus Ultra aprobado en Consejo de Ministros en 2021. “Yo no he ejercido ninguna influencia en el rescate de Plus Ultra [...] eso es una verdad incuestionable”, sustuvo el expresidente. En un escrito en el que el empresario muestra su disposición a “colaborar”, Martínez Martínez asegura que el exlíder socialista era quien “marcaba los pasos a seguir” en esa operación. El presidente de Plus Ultra, Julio Martínez Sola, también se ha dirigido al instructor para colaborar y ofrecer una versión que encaja con la del comisionista. Seguir leyendo

items.title: El ascenso meteórico de Pau Cubarsí, el muro tranquilo de España
items.description: Fuera del terreno de juego pasa desapercibido. Discreto, abraza la normalidad desde sus orígenes, desde la carpintería de su bisabuelo que regenta su padre en el Estanyol (Girona), su pueblo de menos de 200 habitantes. Pero sobre el césped logra lo excepcional. Pau Cubarsí tiene 19 años y un aspecto que sigue pareciendo de alevín . Ese contraste, entre lo que aparenta y lo que ha alcanzado, es la mejor forma de entender su Mundial. “Estamos ante un central que puede marcar una época”, asegura a EL PAÍS Jordi Roura, exresponsable del fútbol base del Barça y quien fichó al joven futbolista. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Argentina se queda huérfana
items.description: El gran favor que la FIFA le hizo a Argentina en este siglo nadie suele recordarlo. Durante cuatro partidos y seis meses, entre noviembre de 2001 y abril de 2002, la Albiceleste dejó de utilizar la camiseta número 10 como tributo a Diego Maradona , que a fines de 2001 acababa de jugar su partido de despedida. La medida intentaba ser definitiva, también aplicable a las selecciones juveniles argentinas, como si en el montañismo se anunciara el cierre de las rutas de escalada al Everest. “Sacar el número 10 es un homenaje a un jugador irrepetible, el más grande futbolista argentino de todos los tiempos, razones suficientes para un gesto generoso”, interpretó Diego Simeone, entonces jugador de la Albiceleste, sobre la decisión tomada por la Asociación del Fútbol Argentino (AFA). Seguir leyendo

items.title: Spencer Tunick lleva sus desnudos colectivos a Canarias: “Hay demasiado odio hacia la gente de mente abierta”
items.description: Cuando, en los años noventa, Spencer Tunick comenzaba su carrera, en Nueva York, a diferencia de otros lugares de Estados Unidos, se permitía fotografiar desnudos en las calles, siempre que fuera con fines artísticos. De ese modo, él aprovechaba las primeras horas del día, cuando la ciudad se estaba desperezando y las calles aún seguían vacías, para tomar sus retratos de personas sin ropa, por entonces individuales. Foto a foto, fue acopiando contactos de “camareros o trabajadores de videoclubes”, hasta que un día acumuló en su agenda más de 70 teléfonos. “Entonces pensé: me va a llevar la vida fotografiar a toda esta gente, así que decidí invitarlos a posar todos a la vez”, explica el fotógrafo en una videollamada desde esa misma ciudad, donde reside con su familia. Seguir leyendo

items.title: De los no nacidos (y de los todavía vivos)
items.description: Ahora que todos volvemos a leer a Hannah Arendt, es necesario mencionar que la idea central de su pensamiento político es la de “nacimiento”: la del comienzo como matriz generadora de historias imprevisibles que se trenzan en un tejido común. “A pesar de que todo el mundo comienza su propia historia, al menos la historia de su propia vida, nadie es su autor o su productor”, dice Arendt en La condición humana , recordando que la existencia siempre nos viene dada y siempre se inscribe en un mundo preconstituido que, sin embargo, gracias a esa novedad puede ser transformado. A Arendt le importaba mucho insistir en el “nacimiento” como lo más decisivo de la vida humana, y ello en clara ruptura con su maestro y amante Martin Heidegger, al que guardó hasta el final una fidelidad pugnaz. Nada resume mejor esta ruptura con el existencialismo (y su ser-para-la-muerte) que esta breve entrada de sus Diarios filosóficos : “Parece como si los hombres desde Platón no hayan podido tomar en serio el hecho de haber nacido, y solo se hayan tomado en serio el hecho de tener que morir”. Esa obsesión por la muerte y la inmortalidad, tan dominante hoy en la ideología de los tenebrosos tecnobros de Sillicon Valley, olvida, en efecto, la importancia política y filosófica del nacimiento. Si la “gran decisión de la filosofía contemporánea” es la disyuntiva entre el Ser y la Tierra, según la última obra del profesor Villacañas , no cabe duda que el énfasis natalicio de Arendt es una clara apuesta por la Tierra frente al Ser. Seguir leyendo

items.title: El día del orgullo hetero
items.description: De la interminable apoteosis balompédica no sé qué llevo peor: a los moralistas chuscos que usan cada mínimo gesto de decencia para explicar obviedades como que todos los españoles son españoles, a los científicos del soccer , que quieren hacernos creer que el concepto “fuera de juego” es inasible o a los filósofos de dos pesetas que sostienen que el fútbol es un Aleph que contiene absolutamente todo, cuando en realidad se deja tantísimo fuera. Una rosa es una rosa y un fife , un fife . ¿Pueden ellos diferenciar una falda cortada al biés de una cortada al hilo? ¿Saben cómo se quitan las manchas de sangre de los tejidos blancos? ¿Cómo se titula el quinto disco de Madonna? No necesito que un analista, un coach o un periodisteta —periodista poeta— me expliquen con prosa engolada los motivos por los que la noche del domingo me desgarré las amígdalas viendo un juego que generalmente me despierta cero unidades de interés. Ni por qué lo hice vestida de rojo y rodeada de mis amigos homosexuales. Ellos no son rencorosos, a pesar de que sus homófobos profesores de gimnasia les humillasen por tener pluma en los penaltis. Yo, en cambio, no me olvido de que Oliver y Benji eran, además de magos del balón, unos misóginos de tomo y lomo. Ni de todos los recreos que pasé ensayando coreografías de divas pop en un espacio vergonzosamente mínimo porque el patio estaba reservado para los verdaderos campeones. Unidos por la furia, mis colegas y yo estuvimos toda la final cosificando a los jugadores, voceándoles piropos de esos que los hombres ya no le pueden decir a las mujeres. Los futbolistas, mientras, se pegaban empujones violentos. Si acaso, que nos expliquen si funciona el grito primal, esa técnica psicoterapéutica desarrollada en los años setenta por Arthur Janov que consiste en revivir y liberar el dolor reprimido mediante un alarido instintivo y profundo. Por él me duele a mí ahora la garganta. A veces no queda otra que dejarse llevar. Y eso lo entiende cualquier imbécil.

items.title: El silencio habita Muriel tras la evacuación por el fuego
items.description: Muriel está en silencio. O casi. El único sonido que rompe la quietud es el de los helicópteros que emergen de entre las montañas tras recoger agua del embalse de Beleña, a un par de kilómetros de distancia. Este pueblo minúsculo fue uno de los primeros de Guadalajara que fueron desalojados por el incendio de La Mierla, que ya ha abrasado alrededor de 26.000 hectáreas, según el último balance de este lunes , el más voraz de la historia de Castilla-La Mancha. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Hispania vaciada: vestigios romanos de pequeñas localidades se convierten en motores de desarrollo rural
items.description: La huella de Roma en España es mucho más extensa que los monumentales vestigios en Mérida, Segovia, Santiponce (Sevilla), Tarragona, Cartagena o Lugo, entre otros. El Imperio dejó semillas en centenares de pueblos diseminados por toda la geografía española que configuran gran parte de la sociedad actual. “Es una civilización que va mucho más allá del circo, las fieras y las orgías ”, ironiza el investigador y director de Clunia Sulpicia (Peñalba de Castro, Burgos), Miguel Ángel de la Iglesia, en referencia a los estereotipos más indelebles de Roma. Pueblos que hoy conforman la conocida como España vaciada fueron hace 2.000 años centros administrativos, económicos, culturales y sociales fundamentales para el Imperio. Ahora, estas localidades, algunas con menos de un centenar de habitantes, se aferran a este glorioso pasado para recuperarlo como motor de desarrollo, más allá de los festivales. Seguir leyendo

items.title: La magistrada Raquel Rodríguez tiene 3.751 causas: así es el nuevo juzgado de la infancia y la adolescencia de Madrid
items.description: Cuando la magistrada Raquel Rodríguez llegó a su nuevo destino el 9 de febrero, encontró una sala prácticamente vacía. Le esperaba una funcionaria sentada frente a una hilera de cuatro mesas. Ella no tenía ni ordenador en su despacho. Así nació el nuevo juzgado de violencia sobre la infancia y la adolescencia en Madrid. Un tribunal de nueva creación que echó a andar ya con atasco de procedimientos. Hasta el 16 de julio ha recibido exactamente 3.751 causas. Rodríguez regresa cada tarde a su casa con una maleta llena de papeles. “No te atreves a aparcar o retrasar cosas”, reconoce la jueza. Sabe que aplazar una decisión puede tener consecuencias fatales en la vida de un menor. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Karin Hindsbo, directora de la Tate: “Si buscas el consenso a toda costa, caes en la parálisis”
items.description: Karin Hindsbo (Gentofte, Dinamarca, 52 años) recibe en su pequeño despacho de la Tate Modern , dentro de la famosa central eléctrica de ladrillo situada a orillas del Támesis que, hace algo más de 25 años, se convirtió en uno de los grandes museos de arte del mundo. Sobria y seria, se sienta ante una hoja llena de apuntes y responde midiendo cada palabra. Solo se sale del guion al recordar su pasado grunge , a propósito de una exposición sobre los noventa que el museo inaugurará en otoño. Seguir leyendo

items.title: ‘Gatsbying’: cuando se suben ‘stories’ para capturar el interés de alguien concreto
items.description: Adam Mosseri, CEO de Instagram, anunció el 4 de junio que los usuarios que paguen 2,99 euros al mes tendrán acceso a Instagram Plus, una suscripción mensual entre cuyas funciones exclusivas existe la búsqueda que permite saber rápidamente si una persona específica vio un story . Para comprender el porqué de esta función es necesario habere tenido alguna vez entre los seguidores un interés romántico, bien sea una expareja, un amante o un crush . Porque como dice una usuaria , “Subir stories sin tener un crush es como trabajar sin cobrar”. “POV (Punto De Vista): estás tan soltero que ya no tienes ni que buscar quién mira tus stories”, dice otro usuario. Dos pruebas irrefutables de que subir contenido destinado a enganchar a una persona concreta es tan habitual que Mosseri y su equipo han decidido sacar partido. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Destrozos, millones y un decorado monumental que nadie notó: ‘Los amantes del Pont-Neuf’, el clásico que estuvo a punto de no existir
items.description: Si Los amantes del Pont-Neuf nunca hubiera terminado de rodarse, como parecía su destino, hoy sería una leyenda. Se habrían estrenado documentales sobre la gran obra frustrada, se habrían escrito libros, y los cinéfilos la habrían construido en su cabeza con la precisión que acaba adquiriendo toda fantasía compartida. Pero de las muchas cosas increíbles que hay alrededor de ella, la más increíble es su propia existencia, que estuvo amenazada durante los casi tres años que duró un rodaje a trompicones. Hasta su autenticidad es pura ilusión, una ilusión por otra parte carísima: lo que debía ser una película de arte y ensayo de ínfimo presupuesto terminó convertido en una película de arte y ensayo de presupuesto faraónico. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Ferran Torres, como símbolo del secreto de Luis de la Fuente
items.description: A Ferran Torres parecía que lo había devorado el meme. No importaba que hubiera terminado la temporada como uno de los goleadores del Barcelona ni que todos sus entrenadores hubieran confiado en él. Guardiola contó con él en el City. Xavi Hernández y Hansi Flick lo mimaron en el Camp Nou. Lo mismo ocurrió en la selección española. Que se lo pregunten a Luis Enrique. Y también a Luis de la Fuente. “He sido muy criticado a lo largo del Mundial, pero el destino estaba escrito”, dijo Ferran. Su destino era marcar el gol de todos, como ya había hecho Andrés Iniesta en Sudáfrica. “Es el de 47 millones de personas. No es mío ni de los que estamos hoy aquí”, añadió el delantero valenciano todavía sobre el césped del estadio de Nueva Jersey. Era el héroe de España. Será, entonces, que nunca fue un meme. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Rodri, el eslabón que conecta el Mundial de 2010 con el de 2026
items.description: La noche que España ganó su primer Mundial en Sudáfrica ninguno de los futbolistas que ganaron el segundo estaba más cerca del lugar de la final del domingo que Rodrigo Hernández, mejor jugador del torneo, eslabón estilístico y fundamental entre las dos estrellas. El mediocentro madrileño se encontraba perdido en los bosques de Connecticut, un par de cientos de kilómetros al norte del estadio de Nueva Jersey donde levantó el trofeo después de apartar con gentileza a Trump de la foto. Seguir leyendo

items.title: Cuando el conocimiento de internet ya no es suficiente: la IA les pone el ojo a las librerías de segunda mano
items.description: Marçal Font se sorprendió un día al detectar unos movimientos extraños en su librería Fènix de Badalona. “Me compraron cuatro libros por 35 euros con unos gastos de envío de 67 euros. Un minuto después pedían otro libro con 20 euros más de gastos de envío. Y así. No tenía ningún sentido”, recuerda. Fue entonces cuando contactó con su amigo Xavi Vinaixa, investigador y director técnico de una empresa tecnológica, para averiguar qué podía haber detrás y no tardaron en dar respuesta al misterio: una empresa estaba haciendo los pedidos para digitalizar los libros e incorporarlos a sistemas de inteligencia artificial. Seguir leyendo

items.title: “No hay una cosa igual en toda la ciudad. Es casi un milagro”: la reforma de AZCA pone en peligro el futuro de los 300 árboles de su desconocido jardín central
items.description: La historia de AZCA es la historia de un agujero. Un boquete de unos 20.000 metros cuadrados situado en el centro del primer distrito financiero de Madrid que, desde el inicio de su construcción, ilustró una derrota. Originalmente, el espacio iba a albergar un gran Teatro de la Ópera, pero nunca llegó a edificarse. En su lugar, se construyó un parque. Contra todo pronóstico, y sobre ese fracaso inicial, floreció un jardín con 367 árboles de 42 especies distintas. Un pequeño oasis, en medio del desierto de hormigón de AZCA, en el que vecinos y oficinistas llevan cuatro décadas refugiándose. Seguir leyendo

items.title: ¿Cuál es la mejor cerveza ‘radler’ con limón?
items.description: Las radler o radlermass son cervezas a las que se les añade zumo de limón o limonada –no un refresco, porque eso sería una shandy o una clara– para hacerlas más cítricas, frescas y veraniegas. Para sorpresa de nadie, este invento surgido en Alemania ha triunfado en uno de los países en los que más calor hace de Europa (nuestra querida y asada España), y muchas cerveceras industriales y artesanas se han lanzado a producirlo. Seguir leyendo

items.description: Hong Kong police have arrested a man on suspicion of making unauthorised investments using assets from a securities brokerage, resulting in an estimated loss of HK$150 million (US$19.1 million), the South China Morning Post has learned. A source said on Tuesday that the suspect was a 26-year-old investment manager at Chief Securities and had worked as a trader for the firm for about six months. He was arrested on suspicion of theft on Monday. The SCMP learned that the suspicious investments...

items.title: Better ties vital for Pak-India-China prosperity: ex-FM Khurshid Mahmud Kasuri
items.description: Chinese Consul General Sun Yan speaks at the forum.—Dawn LAHORE: Former foreign minister Khurshid Mahmud Kasuri has said peaceful co-existence between Pakistan, India and China is essential to unlocking regional connectivity, stabilising trade routes and fighting poverty in one of the world’s poorest regions. He was addressing a gathering to mark the 75th anniversary of diplomatic relations between Pakistan and China and the 105th anniversary of the founding of the Communist Party of China (CPC) here on Monday. The event brought together diplomats, scholars and policymakers, including Chinese Consul General Sun Yan, Understanding China Forum (UCF) founding president Zafaruddin Mahmood, and former ambassador and Director of the Beaconhouse National University Centre for Policy Research (BCPR) Mansoor Ahmad Khan. Kasuri, who is also chairman of the UCF, said Pakistan’s recent diplomatic and defence successes had placed the country in a position of confidence to pursue constructive engagement across South and Central Asia. Pakistan has realised less than 25pc of CPEC’s potential, says former principal secretary to premier Speaking about China’s development journey, Kasuri said the country’s progress had been built on a combination of visionary leadership, strategic planning and a sustained commitment to improving the lives of its people. He identified four key pillars behind China’s success. The first, he said, was people-centred governance, with policies focused on improving the quality of life through poverty alleviation, healthcare, education and infrastructure development. “The second pillar is theoretical innovation,” he said, describing it as the ability to adapt strategies to changing national and global circumstances while remaining committed to long-term development goals. He said leadership development had also been a defining strength, with the CPC placing emphasis on identifying and training capable cadres to ensure disciplined, effective and forward-looking governance. The fourth pillar, he added, was a commitment to peaceful development, with China promoting international stability, cooperation and a shared future for humanity while pursuing its own economic progress. Kasuri also offered a historical analysis of global revolutions, contrasting the Chinese Communist Revolution of 1949 with earlier European, American and Soviet milestones. He highlighted how Chairman Mao Zedong adapted Marxism from an urban-centred ideology to an agrarian-focused movement rooted in rural struggle and resilience, exemplified by the historic Long March. Tracing China’s post-Mao economic trajectory, Kasuri focused on Deng Xiaoping’s pivotal leadership in modernising the nation. He said Deng introduced two foundational maxims that redefined Chinese domestic policy and grand strategy under the concept of “Socialism with Chinese characteristics”, including the famous dictum: “It doesn’t matter if a cat is black or white, so long as it catches mice.” Transitioning to the present era under President Xi Jinping, Mr Kasuri said China no longer needed to hide its capabilities. “Having built a massive economic foundation, China under President Xi has moved towards proactive global engagement, driving high-quality development, technological self-reliance and mega-initiatives such as the Belt and Road Initiative (BRI) and the vision of a Community of Shared Future,” Kasuri said. He also extended his greetings to the Communist Party of China and congratulated the People’s Liberation Army on its 99th anniversary. Former principal secretary to the prime minister Fawad Hassan Fawad recalled that when the China-Pakistan Economic Corridor entered the implementation phase, it was hailed as a flagship project by virtually everyone across the government, bureaucracy and the media. “And yet, we have not been able to achieve even 25pc of the project’s true potential, and we have fallen behind in securing its promised gains,” he lamented. Former provincial finance minister Salman Shah, DWP Group CEO Farooq Naseem, UCF Director Syed Yawar Ali, former foreign secretary Shamshad Ahmed Khan, Civil Services Academy DG Farhan Aziz Khawaja and Lt-Gen Shafaatullah Shah also spoke. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Transición inicia la inhabilitación de 25 comercializadoras eléctricas, además de Holaluz
items.description: El Ministerio para la Transición Ecológica está acelerando la criba de comercializadoras eléctricas que, figurando en el registro oficial de la Comisión Nacional de los Mercados y la Competencia (CNMC), carecen de actividad: de un total de 504 hay 130 inactivas y otras muchas funcionan al mínimo. Así, el pasado jueves, el Boletín Oficial del Estado (BOE) publicaba el procedimiento de inhabilitación de 25 empresas para poder vender electricidad. Curiosamente, en dicha lista no figuraba Holaluz-Clidom , cuyo expediente de inhabilitación fue publicado por separado en el BOE dos días después, el sábado. La comercializadora catalana fue suspendida de cotización este lunes en el BME Growth, la Bolsa de las pequeñas empresas en que cotiza. Seguir leyendo

items.title: South Korea defence minister faces fresh accusations of army desertion over 40 years ago
items.description: Questions surrounding South Korean Defence Minister Ahn Gyu-back’s military service have resurfaced, with the government and his accuser offering conflicting accounts of what happened more than four decades ago. At the centre of the dispute is a gap in Ahn’s military record. His record shows he began mandatory service on November 5, 1983, and was discharged on August 31, 1985, amounting to roughly 22 months. Territorial defence soldiers at the time normally served for 14 months. His accuser...

items.title: Financement politique : nouvelles obligations comptables imposées aux partis et aux candidats
items.description: Le gouvernement marocain renforce l'encadrement du financement des partis politiques et des campagnes électorales à l'approche des prochaines élections législatives. Trois arrêtés conjoints, publiés dans la dernière édition du Bulletin officiel et signés par le ministre de l'Intérieur, Abdelouafi Laftit, le ministre de la Justice, Abdellatif Ouahbi, et la ministre de l'Économie et des Finances, Nadia Fettah, instaurent de nouvelles obligations comptables et financières destinées à accroître la transparence et à renforcer les mécanismes de contrôle. Le premier texte modifie l'arrêté de 2021 relatif aux pièces justificatives des dépenses des partis politiques et aux modèles de présentation des comptes de campagne. Il introduit un modèle plus détaillé imposant aux formations politiques de déclarer l'ensemble des ressources mobilisées pour leurs campagnes électorales, qu'il s'agisse de fonds propres ou des différentes formes de financement public. Les partis devront également préciser l'affectation de ces ressources et produire un état exhaustif des dépenses engagées. Cette réforme prévoit également de nouveaux tableaux destinés à retracer les aides financières accordées aux candidats ainsi que leurs modalités de versement. Une rubrique spécifique est désormais consacrée aux dépenses liées aux campagnes numériques. Celle-ci couvre notamment les contenus publicitaires, les appels, les entretiens ainsi que l'ensemble des actions de communication menées sur les radios privées et les supports numériques. Le deuxième arrêté instaure, pour sa part, une nouvelle obligation à la charge des têtes de liste et des candidats. Chacun devra ouvrir un compte bancaire exclusivement dédié à sa campagne électorale, sur lequel seront centralisées toutes les recettes et à partir duquel seront effectuées toutes les dépenses. Le compte de campagne devra être accompagné d'un justificatif de candidature et d'une déclaration sur l'honneur certifiant l'exactitude des informations fournies. L'ensemble du dossier devra ensuite être transmis à la Cour des comptes dans un délai maximal de quatre-vingt-dix jours à compter de la proclamation officielle des résultats du scrutin. Le troisième arrêté révise le plan comptable unifié applicable aux partis politiques afin de l'aligner davantage sur les normes comptables nationales. Les formations politiques seront désormais tenues de justifier les dépenses de faible montant au moyen de documents signés par au moins deux responsables. Elles devront également intégrer, dans leurs états financiers annuels, les résultats financiers des sociétés qui leur sont affiliées. Au-delà de ces nouvelles exigences comptables, les textes élargissent le périmètre du contrôle exercé sur l'utilisation des financements publics. Celui-ci couvrira désormais les subventions destinées à l'organisation des congrès nationaux ordinaires et extraordinaires ainsi que celles allouées au renforcement de la représentativité des femmes. Les arrêtés renforcent en outre les obligations de justification concernant les dons, les contributions, les prêts, les rémunérations des salariés et les honoraires des experts, tout en soumettant les opérations financières des partis politiques et de leurs sociétés affiliées à des exigences accrues en matière de traçabilité et de contrôle. Cette série de mesures traduit la volonté des autorités de durcir les règles de gestion financière des partis politiques et des campagnes électorales, en renforçant les mécanismes de transparence et de reddition des comptes avant les prochaines échéances législatives. The post Financement politique : nouvelles obligations comptables imposées aux partis et aux candidats appeared first on Hespress Français - Actualités du Maroc .

items.title: Pakistan State Oil to be sole diesel importer in FY27
items.description: ISLAMABAD: The government has imposed a complete ban on importing high-speed diesel (HSD) by private oil marketing companies (OMCs). Instead, only the state-owned Pakistan State Oil (PSO) will handle imports for the current fiscal year. This is part of the federal cabinet’s decisions, which also capped petrol import quantities by private OMCs based on their past sales. The decisions are premised on the Petroleum Division’s request in the wake of ‘prevailing market conditions and in order to minimise the impact of rising petroleum prices on consumers’. Under the decision, PSO would also enter a long-term supply contract with OQ Trading of Oman for petrol imports, in view of security of supplies needed in view of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The decisions have been conveyed to the Oil & Gas Regulatory Authority (Ogra) as fresh policy guidelines for fuel arrangements and a revised pricing mechanism for petroleum products. “HSD import to be allowed only through PSO for FY27,” the guidelines said. Govt caps petrol imports by private OMCs In case of petrol, imports would be allowed to OMCs with the approval of Ogra through the existing mechanism of monthly product review meetings (PRMs) as per their market share for prior months with minimum import parcel of 10,000 tonnes. “In case of default in petrol import commitment by any OMC or delay beyond agreed month of delivery or default in committed upliftment from refineries, it would be disqualified from grant of further import allocation for next nine months by Ogra”, the guidelines read. All other parameters, including exchange rate adjustment, refinery regulatory duty (RRD), Research Octane Number (RON) and HSD Sulphur penalties, and inland freight equalisation margin (IFEM) settlement, shall remain unchanged and applicable as per existing practice. For the purpose of pricing for both petrol and HSD, the import price freight-on-board (FOB) shall be computed on a seven working days rolling average of the published Platts Arab Gulf assessments for the respective product, i.e. MS 92 RON (petrol) and HSD 10 ppm (sulphur particles per million). “Price will be announced daily by Ogra” and would remain unchanged on Saturday and Sunday. To work out import premium, incidentals and customs duty for both petrol and diesel, the benchmark would remain the PSO. The weighted average of actual premiums, incidentals and customs duty of the PSO imported cargoes shall be applied in case of seven days of rolling averages. In case of no import of petrol by PSO in the rolling seven working days, the calendar year-to-date (CYTD) average of premium, incidentals and customs duty shall be applied. Further, in case a long-term supply arrangement is concluded between PSO and any foreign suppliers, e.g., OQ Trading Oman, the premium under such arrangement shall be applied for determination of petrol prices in case of no import during the last seven working days. This practice is similar to the arrangement already in place for HSD, which is mostly imported through a long-term arrangement with Kuwait Petroleum Company (KPC). In case of no import of HSD by PSO in the last seven working days, the KPC term-contract premium shall be applied while incidentals and customs duty shall be applied on the calendar year-to-date average. Under the policy guidelines, “Ogra shall compute and publish the ex-depot prices of petroleum products on a daily basis on its official website, without the requirement of approval from the federal government/prime minister. DG Oil Office would be intimated of each publication”. Interestingly, the same practice of price computation by Ogra is currently in place, which intimates its working to the DG Oil, except that Ogra had stopped publishing prices more than a decade ago on its website after the government reclaimed the price-setting role for political reasons. There is no legal requirement at present for the prime minister to approve petroleum prices. The instructions also state that the petroleum levy (PL) rate shall not exceed the upper limit prescribed by the cabinet. “Within the said limit, the applicable rates of PL for the fiscal year will be advised by Finance Division to Petroleum Division for notification.” Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Clerics from different sects offer joint prayers
items.description: Scholars from different schools of thought pray together at Jamiatur Rasheed in Karachi.—Dawn ISLAMABAD: In a significant move to eradicate inter-sect strife in the country, clerics belonging to all four mainstream schools of thought offered prayers together at what was once considered one of the country’s most hardline seminaries. Briefing the media here on Monday, Pakistan Ulema Council chairman Hafiz Muhammad Tahir Ashrafi said, “Offering prayers together symbolises growing tolerance in society, especially among religious circles”. Ashrafi also serves as Prime Minister’s Coordinator for the National Paigham-i-Aman Committee (NPAC), a group of senior clerics representing the country’s four mainstream schools of thought Shia, Barelvi, Deobandi and Ahle Hadith. The group members, led by Ashrafi, recently visited Jamiatur Rasheed in Karachi and offered collective prayers there. The move is being seen as a significant milestone in the national campaign against extremism, terrorism and sectarian violence, as clerics and spiritual leaders offered Maghrib prayers behind the designated imam of Jamiatur Rasheed. “This is an unprecedented demonstration of religious harmony and national unity by the National Paigham-i-Aman Committee, bringing together eminent ulema and mashaikh, representatives of major religious seminaries, and leaders from different faith communities,” Ashrafi said. He added that the congregation was one of the first of its kind in Pakistan’s history, where scholars representing all schools of Islamic thought assembled at a leading religious institution to offer collective prayers. Those who offered the prayers included Allama Arif Wahidi, Allama Muhammad Hussain Akbar, Mufti Abdul Rahim, Allama Syed Ziaullah Shah Bukhari, Mufti Muhammad Karim Khan, Dr Asif Mir, Mufti Yousaf Kashmiri, Allama Tauqir Abbas, Allama Asad Zaidi, Hafiz Maqbool Ahmed, and representatives of various federations of religious seminaries. Responding to media queries, Ashrafi said there was no inherent discord among the people of Pakistan. However, he said, some miscreants created divisions by dragging society into chaos, while a few religious leaders also backed such elements. “The goal of all responsible ulema in Pakistan is to see Muslims offering prayers together, just as they do in the Two Holy Mosques, standing behind one imam,” he said, adding that one of the committee’s key achievements had been the peaceful and harmonious observance of Muharram. He said the NPAC remained committed to implementing the objectives of Paigham-i-Pakistan by countering extremism, terrorism and sectarian violence while promoting unity, tolerance, mutual respect and national cohesion across the country. The committee has held meetings and gatherings in several cities, visiting not only Muslim places of worship but also those belonging to Sikhs, Hindus and Christians. Established in September 2024, the NPAC comprises clerics, religious leaders from non-Muslim communities and senior government officials to counter extremism, hate speech, terrorism and sectarianism in the country. It is a subcommittee of the National Committee on Narrative Building (NCNB), which includes the information ministers of all four provinces, Gilgit-Baltistan and Azad Jammu and Kashmir, as well as the federal information minister. The NCNB also includes representatives of the military, intelligence agencies, the ministries of foreign affairs and information technology, and the chairman of the Pakistan Telecommunication Authority. According to an official notification, the committee is tasked with overseeing the “information operation, formulation, dissemination, propagation and evaluation of the national narrative against the spread of terrorism and extremism through media, communication and cyber networks” to facilitate the implementation of the Revised National Action Plan 2021. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Judicial Commission of Pakistan suggests judges for high court slots
items.description: ISLAMABAD: The Judicial Commission of Pakistan (JCP) on Monday considered the confirmation of additional judges, the extension in tenure of constitutional benches of the Sindh High Court (SHC), and nominations to fill five vacant positions of additional judges in the provincial high courts as well as vacancies in the Islamabad High Court (IHC). The JCP, by a majority of its total membership, recommended a six-month extension in the term of Justice Khalid Hussain Shahani as an additional judge of the SHC. However, the commission did not confirm another additional judge of the high court, Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah. The commission, which met under the chairmanship of Chief Justice of Pakistan (CJP) Yahya Afridi in the Conference Room of the Supreme Court, made the decisions after due consideration of the relevant data forms, antecedents, and evaluation of the material placed before it. The commission held three separate meetings from 2pm to 5:30pm to consider different agenda items. Both Barrister Gohar Ali Khan and Senator Barrister Syed Ali Zafar, who represent the PTI in the Judicial Commission, did not attend the meetings. During the separate meetings, the commission considered the confirmation of two additional judges, the extension in the tenure of constitutional benches of the SHC, and nominations to fill five vacant positions of additional judges in the provincial high courts, as well as three vacancies in the Islamabad High Court. The chief justices of the four high courts, along with other members of the commission, had already submitted their nominations to the JCP for the appointment of additional judges in the country’s high courts. For the SHC, the commission considered the extension of the tenure of its constitutional benches and, by a majority of its total membership, recommended extending their term by three months. The commission recommended the appointment of Advocate Muhammad Humayon Khan, District and Sessions Judge Suresh Kumar, and Advocate Dr Shah Nawaz Memon as additional judges of the SHC. Two vacancies, however, could not be filled because the nominees failed to secure the required majority of the commission’s total membership. Regarding the IHC, the commission recommended the appointment of three nominees as additional judges. They are Advocate Ayyaz Shaukat, District and Sessions Judge Shahrukh Arjumand, and Advocate Umair Majeed Malik. Regarding the PHC, the JCP, by a majority of its total membership, recommended the confirmation of four additional judges as permanent judges after due consideration of the relevant data forms, antecedents, and evaluation of the material placed before it. They are Justice Farah Jamshed, Justice Inaam Ullah Khan, Justice Sabit Ullah Khan, and Justice Aurangzeb. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Araghchi identifies peace, security as key goals in relations with Islamabad
items.description: • Iranian foreign minister meets Pakistan’s new envoy, discusses ways to strengthen bilateral cooperation • Interior Minister Eskander Momeni lands in Islamabad, will hold talks on US conflict with Pakistani leaders today ISLAMABAD: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Monday identified peace and security as the two key objectives for strengthening relations with Pakistan. He made the remarks while speaking to Pakistan’s newly appointed ambassador, Imran Ahmed Siddiqui, at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Tehran after receiving copies of his credentials. The meeting came as fresh diplomatic efforts were underway to halt the latest round of hostilities between the United States and Iran after an earlier Islamabad-mediated understanding collapsed because of differing interpretations of the memorandum agreed by the two sides, particularly regarding arrangements linked to the Strait of Hormuz. Following the presentation of his letters of credence, Siddiqui and Araghchi discussed bilateral relations, regional developments and ways to expand cooperation across multiple sectors. During the meeting, Araghchi thanked Pakistan for its diplomatic role in recent regional developments and said the present moment offered an opportunity to further strengthen ties between the neighbouring countries. The Iranian foreign minister identified peace and security as the two countries’ shared objectives and stressed the importance of promoting closer bilateral relations. Both sides reaffirmed their commitment to strengthening the longstanding bonds of friendship and expanding cooperation for the mutual benefit of the two neighbours. Momeni arrives in Pakistan Iranian Interior Minister Eskander Momeni will hold talks with Pakistani leaders on the US-Iran conflict on Tuesday (today). Momeni arrived in Islamabad on an official visit on Monday night. Upon his arrival in Pakistan, the senior Iranian official was received by Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi. During his visit, Mr Momeni will meet Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces and Chief of the Army Staff Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir. Earlier reports had suggested that Momeni was likely to engage with Pakistani officials who previously mediated a now-collapsed interim ceasefire between the US and Iran. Pakistan and Iran share a 900-kilometre border and maintain close historical, cultural and religious links, although their relationship has periodically been tested by cross-border militant activity and regional security challenges. Islamabad has assumed an increasingly prominent diplomatic role in this year’s US-Iran crisis, hosting talks, relaying messages between the parties and helping broker a temporary understanding earlier this year. Beyond diplomacy, Pakistan and Iran have sought to deepen economic cooperation through higher bilateral trade, greater connectivity between Pakistani ports and Iran, and renewed discussion of the long-delayed Iran-Pakistan gas pipeline. Progress on many of those initiatives, however, continues to be constrained by US sanctions on Iran, banking restrictions and security concerns along the shared border. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Supreme Court seeks details of Imran’s jail meetings
items.description: • Adiala admin given three weeks to furnish data • Salman Akram Raja claims PTI founder kept in solitary confinement, suffering from eye ailment ISLAMABAD: The Supreme Court on Monday asked the Adiala jail administration to submit within three weeks a report detailing the meetings between incarcerated PTI founder Imran Khan and his family members, lawyers, and friends. The order was passed by a three-member bench headed by Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar while hearing a set of contempt of court petitions filed by PTI’s Secretary General Salman Akram Raja and others challenging the Oct 23, 2025 Islamabad High Court (IHC) order. The IHC had rejected a contempt petition to seek enforcement of the high court’s directives on visitation rights enjoyed by the PTI founder. During the hearing, the bench ord­e­red the Adiala administration to furnish the report containing complete details of meetings between the PTI founder and the visitors during his almost three-year-long stay in jail. At the outset of the hearing, Islam­abad Advocate General Naveed Mal­ik contended that a comprehensive report would be furnished before the court, for which he sought time. On the other hand, Punjab Addit­ional Advocate General Waseem Mumtaz Malik objected to the admissibility of the petitions, saying that an appeal could not be filed against the consensus order issued by the Islamabad High Court (IHC) after the consent of the parties. Justice Mazhar inquired about the number and date of the meetings, observing that a comprehensive report with these details should be submitted to the court. Justice Mazhar recalled that the IHC was given assurance that media talks would not be conducted outside the jail, wondering whether such an assurance was adhered to by the PTI. At this, PTI lawyer Salman Akram Raja said the IHC order was not unanimous. If the order was not unanimous, the counsel should have filed a revision application before the high court, Justice Mazhar observed. Justice Musarrat Hilali, also a member of the bench, observed that if he had any objection to the high court order, he should have filed a review. Raja said the Supreme Court should call for an up-to-date report on the meetings, adding the PTI founder had been kept in solitary confinement and was suffering from an eye ailment. He recalled that he was present in the Islamabad High Court and had assured the bench during the proceedings that there would be no media talk outside the jail. He, however, hastened to add that his opinion could not be applied to others since no other lawyer was present in the courtroom on that day. The court adjourned the hearing for three weeks, seeking a written response. Meanwhile, Salman Akram Raja in the petition had contended that the IHC, while disposing of his contempt petition, relied solely on oral assertion of the Adiala superintendent regarding alleged compliance with previous judicial directions. The appeal pleaded that the high court failed to call for the relevant record about the implementation of its earlier directions to the jail administration for regular meetings with Imran Khan at the Adiala jail. This constitutes a miscarriage of justice and a failure to exercise constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution, the petition contended. The petition had pleaded that IHC failed to appreciate that its own previous judgement of March 24, 2025, had conferred a clear and unambiguous direction regarding visitation rights of the PTI founding chairman with his legal team and nominated coordinators, and that executive authorities were legally bound to comply with judicial orders unless modified or set aside by a superior forum. The petition said the high court, while disposing of the matter on administrative grounds, failed to safeguard these fundamental and inviolable rights. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Chenab water level likely to surge following ongoing rains in Indian-occupied Kashmir, Punjab
items.description: LAHORE: The water level in the Chenab River is likely to surge significantly over the next couple of days following ongoing rains in catchment areas of Indian-occupied Kashmir and fresh spells of heavy rain in parts of Punjab. “At the moment, the Chenab River is flowing in medium flood. Its flow may surge and enter the high-flood category following forecasts of heavy rain over the next three to four days in both held Kashmir and Punjab,” a senior official of the Punjab Irrigation Department told Dawn on Monday. “The situation may turn critical if there are heavy rains, as predicted, in the catchment areas of held Kashmir and Punjab,” he added. Meanwhile, the Pakistan Meteorological Department’s Flood Forecasting Division (FFD) issued a forecast of high flood levels in major rivers, including the Chenab, and nullahs due to heavy rains expected until July 24. According to the FFD’s Monday flood bulletin, the flows of all major rivers were likely to increase significantly by July 24 due to a prevailing westerly wave coupled with a strong monsoon incursion from the Arabian Sea and the Bay of Bengal over the catchments of all major rivers. “High flood levels are expected in River Chenab at Marala, River Jhelum upstream of Mangla and associated nullahs of the Jhelum and Chenab (Dora, Dotta, Dowara, Bhimber, Halsi, Aik and Palkhu) and Ravi (Bein, Bassanter, Deg and Sakki). High flows are also expected in River Kabul and its associated tributaries,” the FFD warned. It also forecast flash flooding in the hill torrents of DG Khan, streams of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and northern Balochistan, and urban flooding in Rawalpindi, Jhelum, Gujranwala, Sargodha, Khushab, Sialkot, Gujrat, Narowal, Lahore, Okara, Sahiwal, Bahawalnagar and Faisalabad. The FFD also mentioned the current situation regarding water flows at various gauging stations. It observed that the River Indus was flowing at “low and below-low levels” at various stations, including Tarbela, Kalabagh, Chashma, Taunsa, Guddu Sukkur and Kotri. “The Jhelum is flowing in low to medium flood at Mangla and Rasul, followed by the Chenab flowing in medium to high flood at Marala, Khanki and Qadirabad. The Ravi and Sutlej rivers are flowing in below-low flood,” it added. Meanwhile, the daily water report issued by the Water and Power Development Authority stated that inflows and outflows in the River Indus at Tarbela were recorded at 232,500 cusecs and 210,000 cusecs, respectively. The inflows and outflows in the Jhelum at Mangla were recorded at 57,400 cusecs and 10,000 cusecs, respectively.

items.title: Govt decreases petrol price by Rs0.35, increases diesel by Rs5.71 per litre
items.description: The government on Monday decreased the price of petrol by Rs0.35 and increased the price of high-speed diesel by Rs5.71 per litre, to pass on the impact of fluctuating global prices following renewed regional hostilities in the Persian Gulf. Following the changes, the price of petrol stands at Rs315.80 per litre and that of HSD at Rs360.06. The Petroleum Division’s press release notifying the increase said the new prices would be effective from July 21 (Tuesday). The diesel price has come down from a peak of Rs520.35 recorded on April 3. Its price had started rising from Rs281 per litre after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28. The petrol price had peaked at Rs458.41 on April 3 after beginning its upward trajectory from Rs266 in the first week of March. Earlier, Petroleum Minister Ali Pervaiz Malik announced that fuel prices would now be fixed on a daily basis due to fluctuations in international market prices following renewed hostilities between Iran and the US. The government had been announcing weekly revisions to fuel prices since early March, alongside measures for the conservation of fuel amid possible oil supply disruptions due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The federal government in April also announced targeted relief measures to provide subsidised fuel. The petroleum minister stated that the cabinet and the prime minister had decided to give the Oil and Gas Regulatory Authority (Ogra) the responsibility of deciding fuel prices on a daily basis based on international market trends. The daily pricing decision was rejected by the All Pakistan Dealers Association, which said it would consider a protest plan this week. Petrol is mainly used in private transport, small vehicles, rickshaws and two-wheelers, and changes in its price affect the middle and lower-middle classes. Similarly, changes in diesel prices also impact the public at large, as it is mainly used in the heavy transport sector, power plants and large generators. Petrol and high-speed diesel (HSD) are the major revenue earners, with monthly sales of about 700,000 to 800,000 tonnes, compared to just 10,000 tonnes of monthly demand for kerosene.

items.title: La muerte de un niño de ocho años por el disparo de un policía conmociona Perú

La madre se ha hecho unos raspones en la cara, pero se tranquiliza al ver que su niño se encuentra bien. Una patrulla llega a la escena y piden al conductor sus documentos y que pase el dosaje etílico. El sujeto está borracho e increpa a los agentes. Uno de los policías saca su arma y dispara. El video no permite ver con exactitud adónde apuntó, pero Junior, que estaba al lado de su madre, se desploma. items.title: FIA sets up cryptocurrency investigation unit
items.description: • Will prevent use of virtual currency for money laundering, terror financing • Director calls for squads to curb crypto use in cybercrime, drug trade • Over 300 human trafficking cases registered in two years ISLAMABAD: The Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) has established a cryptocurrency investigation unit housed in its newly operational National Com­m­and and Control Centre (NC3) to prevent money laundering and terrorism financing through virtual currency transactions. FIA Counter-Terrorism Wing Director Dr Muhammad Athar Waheed told Dawn that while the newly established Pakistan Virt­ual Assets Regulatory Authority (PVARA) was the dedicated authority responsible for regulating digital assets, the cryptocurrency investigation unit would probe the possible use of digital assets in crimes. The official suggested that the National Cyber Crime Investi­gation Agency (NCCIA) and Anti-Narcotics Force (ANF) should also establish similar units to tackle the use of cryptocurrency for cybercrimes and drug-related business. He said new rules were being framed to ensure time-bound completion of all inquiries. “With the introduction of several reform initiatives, the FIA has already demonstrated significant improvement in its performance, and we expect a number of additional key projects to be completed over the next six months,” he said. According to Dr Waheed, Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi played a pivotal role in strengthening the FIA by providing the support needed to modernise the agency. Single platform for coordination Speaking about NC3, he said the centre provided a unified platform for monitoring, intelligence fusion, inter-agency coordination and nationwide operational support and brought key operational units on a single command platform. Its Immigration Monitoring Unit and Integrated Border Management System (IBMS) provide real-time oversight of traveller movements, biometric verification and screening at all ports of entry and exit. The Human Trafficking and Migrant Smuggling Desk coordinates intelligence-led operations against organised smuggling networks, while the Risk Analysis Unit identifies high-risk individuals, suspicious travel patterns and emerging threats. To strengthen investigations into financial crimes, NC3 houses dedicated anti-money laundering (AML) and virtual currency inves­tigation units. The Interpol Desk serves as Pakistan’s national coordination point for international law enforcement cooperation. Similarly, officials said the case management system (CMS) enables real-time monitoring of investigations and performance across the FIA formations nationwide. The centre also enhances public service delivery through a 24/7 helpline, a complaint management unit and overseas complaints cell, ensuring timely assistance to citizens and overseas Pakistanis. “Its intelligence capabilities are further reinforced by open source intelligence (OSINT), cellular detection, cyber patrolling and dark web investigation units, which support intelligence gathering, lawful technical analysis and the detection of cyber-enabled and transnational crimes,” an official said. A centralised daily situation report (DSR) and an operational support desk provide senior leadership with real-time situational awareness and nationwide operational coordination. Meanwhile, to protect FIA investigators, special weapons and tactics (SWAT) teams have also been formed as raiding parties, while a large number of vehicles have been added to the FIA fleet. Officials said international collaboration was also being improved and a new post of the International Coordination director had been created. “Many new things are in the pipeline. Recruitment of around 1,300 officials is in progress while more recruitment will be made in the future,” an official said. For the welfare of FIA employees, rules of the Punjab police have also been adopted. Another official said that during the past two years, over 300 FIRs were registered against human trafficking, with 258 agents arrested and significant recoveries made. “We have busted many gangs involved in human trafficking; as a result, the incidents of boat tragedies are witnessing a decline,” the official claimed. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: Hong Kong bus crashes into barrier, leaving 10 injured
items.description: At least 10 people have been injured when a bus crashed into a barrier on Tuen Mun Road, prompting an emergency response. Police said they received a report at 8.59am on Tuesday of the crash on the Kowloon-bound carriageway near the Bellagio private housing estate in Sham Tseng. Nine women and one man sustained minor injuries. Images widely circulating online show the vehicle involved is a Citybus 952P originally bound for Causeway Bay. The crash shattered the bus’s windscreen and several other...

items.title: Caravane de Don de Sang : la Fondation Orange Burkina Faso et le CNTS harmonisent leurs actions pour 2500 poches de sang
items.description: Le vendredi 17 juillet 2026, la Fondation Orange Burkina Faso a lancé la deuxième édition de sa Caravane de Don de Sang au sein du Centre Médical Orange. Cette initiative qui s'inscrit dans le cadre de l’engagement citoyen de la Fondation Orange est soutenue par le Centre National de Transfusion Sanguine (CNTS). En 2025, grâce aux actions conjointes des associations de donneurs de sang, des collaborateurs de Orange Burkina Faso et des citoyens, la première édition de la caravane de don de sang de la Fondation Orange Burkina Faso a pu mobiliser plus de 2000 poches de sang. Face à un tel succès, la Fondation Orange Burkina Faso en partenariat avec le Centre National de Transfusion Sanguine (CNTS) a lancé la deuxième édition de cette caravane. Selon le secrétaire exécutif de la Fondation , Ibrahim Hema, l'ambition de cette édition est encore plus grande. Pendant des mois, dit-il, la caravane sillonnera la ville de Ouagadougou et ses artères ainsi que la ville de Bobo-Dioulasso. L'objectif étant de faire du don de sang le quotidien des populations. « Notre objectif cette année est clair : 2 500 poches de sang que nous voulons collecter sur deux mois. C'est un défi qui est ambitieux, nous le savons, mais il est à la hauteur de la générosité de la population. Nous sommes convaincus qu'ensemble, nous pouvons une fois de plus dépasser nos objectifs et contribuer significativement au renforcement des réserves nationales en produits sanguins labiles », a-t-il indiqué. Par ailleurs, le secrétaire exécutif de la Fondation Orange Burkina a indiqué que la caravane de don de sang est en droite ligne avec la vision du gouvernement burkinabè avec à sa tête le Président du Faso, le Capitaine Ibrahim Traoré. « En donnant son sang, chacun apporte une contribution concrète à l'effort national et participe à la construction d'un Burkina Faso plus solidaire et plus résilient », a-t-il ajouté. La Fondation Orange Burkina Faso a reçu une distinction de la part de son partenaire le CNTS Cette caravane de don de sang est organisée en partenariat avec le Centre National de Transfusion Sanguine (CNTS). Le directeur général du CNTS, Dr Désiré Nezien, a souligné la parfaite collaboration qui existe entre les deux structures. A l'écouter, le CNTS s'assure de la coordination des différentes actions afin d'assurer la réussite de cette campagne de don de sang. La cérémonie de lancement de la caravane de don de sang a été l'occasion pour la Fondation Orange Burkina Faso de recevoir une distinction de la part de son partenaire le CNTS en l'honneur de la journée mondiale du donneur de sang qui est célébrée le 14 juin de chaque année. Faso7 L’article Caravane de Don de Sang : la Fondation Orange Burkina Faso et le CNTS harmonisent leurs actions pour 2500 poches de sang est apparu en premier sur Faso7 .

items.title: Burkina Faso : Le ministre de la Santé galvanise le personnel du CSPS urbain de Bittou
items.description: De retour de Cinkansé après le lancement conjoint de la campagne transfrontalière de chimio-prévention du paludisme entre le Burkina Faso et le Togo, le ministre de la Santé, le Dr Jean-Claude Kargougou, a marqué une halte au CSPS urbain de Bittou, ce 20 juillet 2026. Sur place, le ministre a exprimé sa reconnaissance et sa solidarité envers les agents du centre pour leur résilience face aux conditions de travail difficiles. En 2023, deux agents du centre ont été enlevés par des terroristes. Le ministre a félicité et remercié les agents du centre de santé pour la solidarité qu’ils ont exprimée à l’endroit des familles de leurs collègues enlevés. « Vous leur avez apporté beaucoup de réconfort à travers votre présence, à travers vos prières, à travers vos appuis matériels et financiers. Je suis fier de ce que nous soyons une famille unie » , a-t-il laissé entendre. Saisissant cette occasion, le Dr Bourama Ouattara, médecin-chef du district sanitaire de Bittou, a exposé quelques difficultés d’ordre matériel auxquelles est confronté l'hôpital. Il a fait cas du manque de lits et de matelas pour la prise en charge des patients, ainsi que de l’absence d’appareils de radiographie numérique. Il a également sollicité le renforcement des formations sanitaires en ressources humaines. « En tout cas, cette visite est très encourageante pour nous, un personnel qui reste déterminé face aux défis que nous rencontrons actuellement » , a-t-il ajouté. En réponse, le ministre a dit avoir pris note des doléances, promettant d’examiner dans quelle mesure apporter des réponses pragmatiques. Il a souligné que la santé occupe une haute priorité stratégique dans la vision du camarade président du Faso, le capitaine Ibrahim Traoré. « Comme le camarade capitaine Ibrahim Traoré l’a dit, restez focus sur la mission. Restez professionnels. Continuez à accueillir les patients avec beaucoup de dignité, de respect et d’humanité. Car, quand on est agent de santé, c’est un sacerdoce » , a-t-il déclaré. Josué TIENDREBEOGO Faso7 L’article Burkina Faso : Le ministre de la Santé galvanise le personnel du CSPS urbain de Bittou est apparu en premier sur Faso7 .

items.title: Burkina Faso : Le ministre de la Santé inspecte les infrastructures de soins et le dispositif de surveillance transfrontalière à Cinkansé
items.description: En marge du lancement conjoint de la campagne transfrontalière de chimio-prévention du paludisme entre le Burkina Faso et le Togo, le ministre de la Santé, le Dr Jean-Claude Robert Kargougou, a visité le centre médical de Cinkansé, ce 20 juillet 2026. Au cours de son passage, le ministre s’est enquis des réalités auxquelles est confronté le personnel. Il en ressort, entre autres, que la maternité de l'hôpital enregistre en moyenne 200 accouchements par mois. Sur place, le ministre a félicité les agents pour le travail abattu malgré les conditions difficiles, tout en les encourageant à maintenir leur professionnalisme pour offrir des soins de qualité aux patients. « Nous avons vu des agents motivés, qui sont à la tâche. Nous avons vu des agents qui, dans ce contexte difficile, continuent d’assurer la continuité des soins malgré le contexte que nous connaissons » , a déclaré le ministre. Le Centre médical communal de Cinkansé fini à environ 70%-©Faso7 Le ministre a aussi visité le chantier de construction du centre médical communal de Cinkansé, qui affiche un taux d’exécution d’environ 70 %. Certains usagers se sont réjouis de la réalisation de cette infrastructure dans le cadre de l’Initiative présidentielle pour la santé (IPS), destinée à pallier la vétusté du centre médical actuel. « Nous avons espoir que, dans les prochains mois, cette infrastructure sera achevée et que cela contribuera réellement à améliorer l’offre de santé dans de bien meilleures conditions de travail » , ont-ils indiqué. Par la suite, le ministre s’est rendu à l’agence de surveillance sanitaire du point d’entrée de Cinkansé. Cette structure est chargée d’effectuer des contrôles sanitaires sur les voyageurs en transit vers le Burkina Faso. Ses agents veillent à l’hygiène au sein des moyens de transport et sensibilisent les passagers aux maladies prioritaires, notamment la méningite, la fièvre jaune, la variole du singe (Mpox) et Ebola. « De façon générale, lorsqu’ils arrivent ici, on fait le dépistage pour voir s’il n’y a pas un passager qui a de la fièvre. S’il y a un passager fiévreux, on le fait asseoir et on procède aux examens. S’il n’y a pas de problème, il peut continuer son voyage » , a expliqué Antoine Segda, médecin responsable de l’agence de surveillance sanitaire. Le ministre Kargougou prend connaissance des interventions de l'agence de surveillance sanitaire du point d'entrée de Cinkansé-©Faso7 Au cours des échanges, le ministre a encouragé les agents de santé qui y travaillent, les invitant à demeurer des VDP de la sécurité sanitaire. « Le point d’entrée constitue la première ligne de défense de notre pays en matière de lutte contre les risques sanitaires et les épidémies. Toute maladie détectée à temps, c’est un peu comme une épidémie que nous évitons. Donc, véritablement, il était important que je vienne ici pour voir ces volontaires de la défense de la patrie en matière de sécurité sanitaire » , a-t-il déclaré. En moyenne, l’agence traite plus de 3 000 passagers par semaine. Aboubakar Sidiki Ouédraogo, responsable du centre médical de Cinkansé assurant la surveillance épidémiologique au point d’entrée, a salué cette visite du ministre. Il a profité de l’occasion pour solliciter la mise à disposition d’équipements modernes au profit de l’agence de surveillance, notamment des scanners corporels. De plus, les agents de santé du point d’entrée rencontrent des difficultés liées à l’offre vaccinale. Certains passagers expriment leur incompréhension par rapport au coût élevé des vaccins. D’autres, ne connaissant que le vaccin contre la fièvre jaune dans leur pays, se demandent pourquoi le vaccin contre la méningite est recommandé au Burkina Faso. Cela est dû au fait que les vaccins ne sont pas harmonisés au sein de l’Union économique et monétaire ouest-africaine (UEMOA). En outre, les agents sur place ont témoigné de la bonne collaboration avec la partie togolaise, surtout en ce qui concerne le partage d’informations sanitaires. Josué TIENDREBEOGO Faso7 L’article Burkina Faso : Le ministre de la Santé inspecte les infrastructures de soins et le dispositif de surveillance transfrontalière à Cinkansé est apparu en premier sur Faso7 .

items.title: Lutte contre le paludisme : Le Burkina Faso et le Togo lancent conjointement la campagne 2026 de chimio-prévention à Cinkansé
items.description: Le ministre de la Santé du Burkina Faso, le Dr Jean-Claude Robert Kargougou, et son homologue du Togo, Jean-Marie Koffi Ewonoulé Tessi, ont lancé conjointement la campagne transfrontalière 2026 de chimioprévention du paludisme, ce 20 juillet 2026 à Cinkansé. Cette campagne concerne les enfants âgés de 3 à 59 mois non malades, avec l'administration de préventifs. La première phase se déroulera du 23 au 26 juillet 2026 dans les localités frontalières du Burkina Faso et du Togo. La première administration a été effectuée par les deux ministres en territoire togolais. Cet événement a réuni plusieurs autorités coutumières et religieuses de la zone. Le ministre Jean-Claude Kargougou a administré la premier dose à une fillette-©Faso7 La chimio-prévention est reconnue comme l'une des interventions les plus efficaces pour protéger les enfants âgés de 3 à 59 mois contre le paludisme, dans les zones de forte transmission saisonnière. Elle permet de réduire significativement les formes graves du paludisme ainsi que les décès qui y sont liés. Le Dr Jean-Claude Kargougou a souligné que ce lancement marque une étape importante du partenariat bilatéral entre le Burkina Faso et le Togo, en droite ligne avec la vision des plus hautes autorités des deux pays. « Cette vision nous invite à construire des solutions africaines aux défis africains, dans un esprit de solidarité, de responsabilité partagée et d'intégration régionale » , a-t-il souligné. Il a indiqué que la réponse au paludisme ne peut être que commune, étant donné que cette maladie ne fait pas de distinction entre ses victimes. « Je formule le vœu que cette dynamique inspire d'autres initiatives communes, notamment dans les domaines de la vaccination, de la surveillance des maladies, de la santé maternelle et infantile, de la préparation aux réponses aux urgences sanitaires et plus largement de la construction d'une véritable sécurité sanitaire régionale » , a ajouté le ministre. Le ministre de la Santé du Togo a administré la première dose à un garçon-©Faso7 Jean-Marie Koffi Ewonoulé Tessi, ministre en charge de la Santé du Togo, a salué la mutualisation des efforts des États pour éliminer le paludisme, l'un des défis sanitaires les plus persistants de la sous-région. « La maladie ne demande pas de passeport. Le moustique ne connaît ni zone frontalière, ni poste de contrôle, ni limite administrative. Face à cela, nos réponses doivent aussi être mobiles, autant que coordonnées » , a-t-il déclaré. Le ministre togolais a insisté sur la nécessité de coordonner la prévention. Il a attiré l'attention sur la mobilité permanente des populations à la frontière, soulignant que certains enfants pourraient être exposés à un double traitement, ce qui peut causer des effets indésirables. « Par contre, d'autres aussi peuvent être oubliés, parce qu'ils ne se trouvent pas, lors des passages de nos équipes, dans leurs zones habituelles de résidence. C'est précisément pour cela que nos deux États ont fait le choix responsable d'harmoniser leurs calendriers, leurs approches et leurs efforts » , a-t-il laissé entendre. Le ministre burkinabè arme celui du Togo d'une arc pour éliminer le paludisme -©Faso7 Jean-Marie Koffi Ewonoulé Tessi a aussi souligné que ce lancement conjoint constitue un acte politique fort, traduisant la volonté des gouvernements des deux pays de placer la santé au cœur de leur collaboration, en faisant de leur proximité géographique et historique une force. « En lançant ensemble cette campagne, nous affirmons une évidence. Un enfant vivant à Cinkansé, à Soudougui, à Yargatenga, à Poniou, à Samnaba, à Dapaong ou dans toute autre localité mérite la même protection, la même attention et les mêmes chances de survie » , a déclaré le ministre. À la fin de la cérémonie, les deux ministres se sont offert mutuellement des présents. Le Dr Jean-Claude Robert Kargougou a offert à son homologue togolais un chapeau de Saponé, un sac en cuir, un arc, un sac en Faso Dan Fani et le pagne Faso Dan Fani du Secrétariat permanent de lutte contre le paludisme (SP-Palu). Il lui a également remis le Manifeste de la Révolution progressiste populaire et le « Le Capitaine Ibrahim Traoré a dit » . À son tour, Jean-Marie Koffi Ewonoulé Tessi a offert au Dr Jean-Claude Robert Kargougou un trophée symbolique de la coopération entre le Burkina Faso et le Togo, ainsi qu'un pagne togolais. Josué TIENDREBEOGO Faso7 L’article Lutte contre le paludisme : Le Burkina Faso et le Togo lancent conjointement la campagne 2026 de chimio-prévention à Cinkansé est apparu en premier sur Faso7 .

items.title: Two expeditions succeed in summit bids
items.description: GILGIT: Eight members of a Pakistani expedition team successfully summited Broad Peak (8,051m), while eight women climbers reached the summit of Khosar Gang, a 6,040-metre peak in the Shigar Valley, in separate achievements announced on Monday. According to a statement issued by Karakoram Expeditions, the Broad Peak team included Argentina’s Juan Pablo Toro and Pakistan’s Ahmad Baig, Rizwan Dad, Waqar Ali, Mansoor Karim, Nawaz Ali Khan, Mirza Ali and Zaman Karim. The statement said the lead rope-fixing team reached the summit via a new direct variation, bypassing Section V and the long ridge above Camp IV. After analysing the route, expedition leader Mirza Ali led the team from Camp III at 2am on Sunday and they reached the summit at 10pm. Meanwhile, the Alpine Club of Pakistan said its Second Women’s Khosar Gang Expedition successfully summited Khosar Gang. The climbers were Zeba Batool and Bibi Afzoon from Gilgit-Baltistan, Haiqa Ghazi and Ammara Sharif from Islamabad, Maria Khan from Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Bisma Hassan and Sadia Maqbool from Punjab, and Bibi Malka from Balochistan. The expedition, launched by the Alpine Club of Pakistan, aimed to promote women’s participation in mountaineering, adventure sports and outdoor leadership. A documentary team, including Haiqa Ghazi and Sharukh, accompanied the climbers. The participants were selected through a transparent process by a committee of experienced women mountaineers led by renowned Pakistani climber Naila Kiani. The expedition was conducted under the leadership and technical guidance of high-altitude guides Ali Muhammad Sadpara, Sadiq Hussain Sadpara and Ilyas Hushay, while Qauid Shigri fixed ropes on the peak. “Our women climbers have proven that they are fully capable of achieving the highest goals through courage, determination, professionalism and teamwork,” Alpine Club of Pakistan General Secretary Ayaz Shugri said. He added that the club would organise the K2 Baltoro Cleanup Expedition in September to promote environmental conservation and responsible mountain tourism. Published in Dawn, July 21st, 2026

items.title: French parliament's committee approves social media ban for under-15s
items.description: A reconciliation committee of the French parliament agreed on a bill on Monday to ban access to social media for ‌those under 15 years of age. French President Emmanuel Macron has said he wants the ban to be in force by the start of the school year in early September. France would follow Australia, which enacted the ​world's first ban for under-16s on platforms including ​Meta Platforms' Facebook, Snap's Snapchat, Bytedance's TikTok and Alphabet's YouTube in December. Macron has drummed up support for the ban in the European Union and elsewhere. European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen has recently ‌supported limiting children's access to social media in the 27-country bloc. The reconciled text will be discussed on Tuesday in the Lower House and later in the Senate. The information technology minister will establish a list of the social networks banned for children and teenagers younger than 15 years old. Social media platforms will have to set up systems of age verification approved by the French privacy regulator. The bill would also ban the use of smartphones in high schools.

items.title: Forum international de la diaspora au Mali: le Burkina partage son expérience en matière de mobilisation de ses ressortissants
items.description: Du 16 au 18 juillet 2026, le Burkina Faso a pris part à la IIe édition du forum international de la diaspora à Bamako en République soeur du Mali, à travers une délégation conduite par la camarade Bêbgnasgnan Stella Eldine Kabré, ministre déléguée auprès du camarade ministre des Affaires étrangères. Placée sous le très haut patronage de Son Excellence le général d’Armée Assimi Goïta, Président de la Transition, chef de l’Etat, cette édition a eu pour thème : « Diaspora malienne et investissements productifs: bâtir un Mali économiquement fort et durable ». Ce forum organisé sous l’égide du ministère des Maliens établis à l’Extérieur et de l’Intégration africaine, a connu une forte participation des investisseurs de la diaspora malienne et du secteur privé. Son objectif est de promou-voir et de soutenir les investissements des diasporas du Mali et des autres pays frères de l’AES dans leurs pays d’origine, de favoriser les partenariats économiques, et d’encourager le transfert de compétences. Il s’est agi d’explorer les voies et moyens d’orienter ces investissements vers des projets structurants et des investissements productifs, afin de faire de la diaspora, un levier stratégique pour le développement endogène et durable. Il se présente également comme une véritable opportunité de réseautage et d’échanges, ainsi que de partage d’expérience. Aux côtés des autres ministres de la Confédération des Etats du Sahel (AES), la camarade ministre déléguée a participé au panel de haut niveau, de même qu’aux différentes rencontres des ministres de la Confédération sur la gouvernance de la diaspora et la participation de celle-ci au développement national. Ce forum a été une tribune pour le Burkina Faso, de partager son expérience en matière de gouvernance migratoire et de présenter ses acquis dans le domaine de la gestion, de la mobilisation et de l’organi-sation de sa diaspora. A cet effet, la camarade ministre déléguée a mis en lumière la contribution de cette diaspora aux projets struc-turants, aux investis-sements productifs et à l’entrepre-neuriat dans la mère patrie. En outre, elle a insisté sur les transferts de compétences et la contribution des Burkinabè de l’extérieur aux différentes initiatives de développement socio-économiques et sécuri-taires, pour le développement endogène, notamment au Fonds de soutien patriotique et aux différentes initiatives présidentielles. DCRP/MAE
